title: Project and Technical Engineer
description:
Job Description

We are seeking a hands-on and detail-oriented Project and Technical Engineer to lead the deployment and integration of our security systems. The ideal candidate will have experience in system implementation, technical coordination, and Building Information Modeling (BIM) to support project planning and execution.


Key Responsibilities

· Manage assigned projects involving integrated security systems such as CCTV, intrusion detection, access control, and intercom systems

· Oversee installation, testing, and commissioning of systems according to customer requirements, budget, and schedule

· Supervise and monitor progress of project on-site

· Conduct site surveys and attend site meetings to monitor project progress

· Liaise with relevant stakeholders to ensure technical compliance and accurate reporting

· Utilize BIM tools to support project design, coordination, clash detection, and documentation

· Prepare and update technical drawings including shop drawings, floor plans, and single-line diagrams using BIM and CAD platforms

· Sourcing materials and coordinate timely delivery aligned with site progress and budget constraints

· Respond to customer feedback and complaints, implementing corrective and preventive actions

· Provide regular updates to stakeholders on project status, technical challenges, and forecasts


Requirements

· Diploma or degree in Electrical/Electronics Engineering, IT, or related field

· 2–5 years of experience in project engineering or system integration

· Familiarity with security systems (CCTV, access control, alarm systems) and IP networking

· Proven experience in AutoCAD and BIM software (e.g., Revit, Navisworks) is preferred

· Strong project coordination and stakeholder management skills

· Excellent oral and written communication skills

· Independent, resourceful, and able to work under pressure

postedCompany.description:
ARROWCREST TECHNOLOGIES PTE LTD


ARROW - Focus, Sharpness and Precision in our Products, Decision Making and Directions
CREST - At the edge of modern technology, watching over the security of lives and properties 

About ARROWCREST:-
Arrowcrest Technologies Pte Ltd is a leading System Design and Integration House for Intelligence Security Systems, founded in March 1998.

We provide customary development of integrated security management suite to satisfy the ever-changing demand of intelligence system.

We gained significant market application of our product with major customers across government offices, finance sector, statutory organizations, and emerging SMEs etc, in Singapore, Maldives, Malaysia, Indonesia, Vietnam and Brunei. Company Vision:-
To withstand our leading position in the realm of surveillance and niche in the world of ever-changing technology.

Company Mission:-
To seek continuous breakthrough providing solutions to the daily sophisticated security needs.

Company Values:-
Versatile application of security device and technology, not restricted by brand or any shortfall, incorporating the gist of each and striking the best balancing point of technology and price combination in achieving the best solution designed for each individual integrated security demand.
